inputs.text: 纪信, Qin-Han transition period, loyal retainer during the Siege of Xingyang, disguised as the Han king to help Liu Bang escape, restrained noble disguise layered over wartime robes, Xingyang city gate at night, firelight, besieging Chu forces in the distance, chariot and guards near the gate, tragic resolute expression, protective sacrifice, walking into danger with dignity, no death scene, semi-realistic guofeng card illustration, ancient book paper grain, bronze and stone texture, dark mobile card palette, low-saturation gold accents, cinematic lighting, vertical 3:4 composition, no card frame baked into the art
